Feature 3 (EV Line 4.5x10 D1): PASS - 7 steps with Countersink NECK-455 for dense bone
Feature 4 (EV Line 5.0x12 D3): PASS - 6 steps (Pilot 2.1, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0, Final 4.5, Place), depth=12.5
Feature 5 (3P 4.0x12 D2): PASS - 6 steps with Countersink NECK-354 for dense bone
Feature 6 (3P 4.0x12 D4): PASS - 5 steps with Compactor for soft bone
Feature 7 (3P 5.0x10 D1): PASS - 8 steps with Countersink NECK-455
Feature 8 (3P Long 3.75x20 D1): PASS - 6 steps with Countersink NECK-334, depth=20.5
Feature 9 (3P Long 3.75x20 D3): PASS - 5 steps with Compactor for soft bone
Feature 10 (Wide Line 6.0x10 D3): PASS - 9 steps sequential drilling, depth=10.5
Feature 11 (Wide Line 5.5x8 D3): PASS - 8 steps sequential drilling, depth=8.5
Feature 12 (Dura-Vit Slim 3.4x10 D3): PASS - 4 steps with Optional 3.2 drill
Feature 13 (Dura-Vit Slim 3.4x10 D1): PASS - 4 steps with Final 3.4 drill
Feature 14 (Dura-Vit Slim 3.0x12 D3): PASS - 3 steps (Pilot 2.1, Drill 3.0, Place), depth=12.5

Feature 16 (EV Line no Compactor): PASS - EV Line correctly has no Compactor in soft bone

Feature 18 (Depth calculation): PASS - All systems correctly use Drill Depth = Implant Length + 0.5mm

seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on drilling protocol generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: B&B Dental drilling protocols fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: DRILLING_PROTOCOLS at lines 4259-4288 in server.py, _generate_bb_dental_protocol function at line 4290. Protocol rules: (1) Drill Depth = Implant Length + 0.5mm, (2) Dense bone (D1/D2) gets Final Drill + Countersink, (3) Soft bone (D3/D4) gets undersized Final Drill + optional Compactor (3P/3P Long only), (4) Wide Line uses standard sequential drilling without Countersink, (5) Dura-Vit Slim uses simplified narrow sequence. Countersink mapping: 3.5→NECK-334, 3.75→NECK-334, 4.0→NECK-354, 4.5→NECK-455, 5.0→NECK-455.
